name: Drift On Snow
short_description: Who doesn't look forward to winter as much as we do?
detailed_description:
Who doesn't look forward to winter as much as we do?

Well, we have a special reason why we have been preparing all year round.

Just imagine, a lot of snow, you and a supercar in front of you with rear wheel drive. I think it's every car fan's dream.

Everything is happy and beautiful, but be very careful when performing these drifts because the cars have too much horsepower and you might end up in situations out of control.

That's why the Drift on Snow game has prepared a special training mode for you to test different situations so that you can show a masterclass in front of your friends.Ready ?

The main game features:

- Some mods like practice
- Levels which are easy/hard
- Timer
